files.content:
# phytron.db
# EPICS database for initial Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH IOC scaffold.
# Records are separated from protocol definitions per StreamDevice best practice.

# Position readback
record(ai, "$(P)POS_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Motor position readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getPos PORT")
    field(SCAN, "1 second")
    field(PREC, "3")
}

# Speed readback
record(ai, "$(P)SPEED_RBV") {
    field(DESC, "Motor speed readback")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(INP,  "@phytron.proto getSpeed PORT")
    field(SCAN, "2 second")
    field(PREC, "3")
}

# Move in positive direction
record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_PLUS") {
    field(DESC, "Move motor in positive direction")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto movePlus PORT")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Execute")
}

# Move in negative direction
record(bo, "$(P)MOVE_MINUS") {
    field(DESC, "Move motor in negative direction")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto moveMinus PORT")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Execute")
}

# Stop command
record(bo, "$(P)STOP") {
    field(DESC, "Stop motor motion")
    field(DTYP, "stream")
    field(OUT,  "@phytron.proto stopMove PORT")
    field(ZNAM, "Idle")
    field(ONAM, "Stop")
}

#!../../bin/linux-x86_64/phytronIOC

# st.cmd
# Initial IOC startup script for Phytron MCC-1 MINI-W-ETH using StreamDevice over TCP.
# Adjust binary path, dbd name, and support paths to match the target IOC application.

< envPaths

cd "${TOP}"

# Load IOC database definition
# Replace 'phytronIOC' with the actual IOC application name if different.
dbLoadDatabase "dbd/phytronIOC.dbd"
phytronIOC_registerRecordDeviceDriver pdbbase

# Configure TCP/IP communication port for the controller.
# Hostname/IP should be supplied via macro or edited here during deployment.
# Format: drvAsynIPPortConfigure(portName, hostInfo, priority, noAutoConnect, noProcessEos)
drvAsynIPPortConfigure("PORT", "$(PHYTRON_HOST=127.0.0.1):22222", 0, 0, 0)

# Optional asyn tracing for initial debugging.
# Increase or decrease as needed during commissioning.
asynSetTraceMask("PORT", -1, 0x9)
asynSetTraceIOMask("PORT", -1, 0x2)

# Load the StreamDevice database.
# Prefix example: PHY:MC1:
dbLoadRecords("db/phytron.db", "P=$(P=PHY:MC1:)")

cd "${TOP}/iocBoot/${IOC}"

iocInit

# End of startup script.
